ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the city belongs to */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the city's mayor */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city (e.g., metropolitan, urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "income_median" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the neighborhood (e.g., high school, college, university) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the neighborhood */,
  "in_db_emp" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database employment area */,
  "prox_idx_emp" REAL /* Index of proximity to employment areas */,
  "in_db_pharma" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database pharmacy area */,
  "prox_idx_pharma" REAL /* Index of proximity to pharmacy areas */,
  "in_db_childcare" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database childcare area */,
  "prox_idx_childcare" REAL /* Index of proximity to childcare areas */,
  "in_db_health" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database healthcare area */,
  "prox_idx_health" REAL /* Index of proximity to healthcare areas */,
  "in_db_grocery" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database grocery area */,
  "prox_idx_grocery" REAL /* Index of proximity to grocery areas */,
  "in_db_educpri" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database primary education area */,
  "prox_idx_educpri" REAL /* Index of proximity to primary education areas */,
  "in_db_educsec" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database secondary education area */,
  "prox_idx_educsec" REAL /* Index of proximity to secondary education areas */,
  "in_db_lib" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database library area */,
  "prox_idx_lib" REAL /* Index of proximity to library areas */,
  "in_db_parks" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database park area */,
  "prox_idx_parks" REAL /* Index of proximity to park areas */,
  "in_db_transit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the neighborhood is within a database transit area */,
  "prox_idx_transit" REAL /* Index of proximity to transit areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., employment center, pharmacy, childcare service) */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., employment center, pharmacy, childcare service) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the amenity */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the amenity (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead researcher of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team the project belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data usage */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project that accessed the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., demographic, geographic) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)
